title: Fast Sleep – Single Player Sleep
description: A lightweight and lag-free One Player Sleep datapack that lets only one player skip the night or stop phantoms for everyone. Works on singleplayer & multiplayer without commands, mods, or plugins.
body:
🌙 Single Player Sleep Datapack
This datapack allows any one player to sleep and instantly skip the night for the entire world — just like popular servers do. No more waiting for all players to get in bed!

Perfect for multiplayer, friends world, or singleplayer QoL.

✅ Features

✔ Skip night when only one player sleeps
✔ Works in all dimensions where beds are allowed
✔ Removes phantoms automatically (optional)
✔ Lightweight – 0 lag, pure functions
✔ Supports Minecraft 1.21+
✔ Works on servers + realms + singleplayer
✔ No setup required — plug and play

⭐ How It Works

A player enters a bed

Datapack checks if sleep is valid

Night instantly skips for everyone

Weather optionally clears

A clean good morning message appears

No commands required from players!


👍 Perfect For

SMP servers

LAN worlds

Friends survival

Hardcore worlds

Solo players who hate waiting

📦 Installation

Download the .zip

Put it into:
world/datapacks/

Run:
/reload

Enjoy!
